title: Wicked Paintings
body:
# WickedPaintings

image url as painting

![cat](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fooooooooooooooo/WickedPaintings/master/images/cat.png)

![Painting Edit Screen](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fooooooooooooooo/WickedPaintings/master/images/edit.png)

Maximum width and height of 32x32

## Config

![Config screen](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fooooooooooooooo/WickedPaintings/master/images/config.png)

Disabling rendering causes the paintings to be completely invisible in the world

## Crafting

### Vanilla painting > Wicked painting

![From painting](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fooooooooooooooo/WickedPaintings/master/images/from_painting.png)

### Wicked painting > Vanilla painting

![To painting](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fooooooooooooooo/WickedPaintings/master/images/to_painting.png)
